rationale: The ongoing war remains the dominant reality for Ukrainian residents; EU accession process launch is a significant positive milestone for morale and political future, while no new major escalation occurred this cycle.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: Formal EU accession process launched for Ukraine — a landmark positive development for wartime morale and Ukraine's long-term political and economic future, even as the war continues.

top_events.title: Active war with Russia — ongoing strikes and infrastructure pressure
top_events.summary: No major new escalation reported this cycle, but the war continues to define daily life for Ukrainians — air strikes, displacement, and infrastructure strain remain constant background realities.

top_events.title: Putin admits Ukraine attacks hitting Russian economy and society
top_events.summary: Putin's public acknowledgment of economic and social strain caused by the war is a qualitative signal of Russian vulnerability — a cautiously positive indicator for Ukraine's long-term resistance.
